name: Sangen Summoning
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>盃</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>さかずき</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>満</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>み</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>ちる<ruby lang="jp"><rb>燦</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>さん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>幻</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>げん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>荘</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>そう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: During your Main Phase 1, FIRE Dragon monsters you control are unaffected by your opponent's activated effects. During your Main Phase: You can add 1 "Tenpai Dragon" monster from your Deck to your hand, then discard 1 card. You can only use this effect of "Sangen Summoning" once per turn. If this card is destroyed during the Battle Phase: You can target 1 Dragon Synchro Monster you control; double its ATK.
eff: During your Main Phase 1, FIRE Dragon monsters you control are unaffected by your opponent's activated effects. During your Main Phase: You can add 1 "Tenpai Dragon" monster from your Deck to your hand, then discard 1 card. You can only use this effect of "Sangen Summoning" once per turn. If this card is destroyed during the Battle Phase: You can target 1 Dragon Synchro Monster you control; double its ATK.

mst: Unaffected by the opponent's card effects
misc: Requires control of specific Monster card type
